chapter_context.summary: Paul concludes with instructions for the collection for Jerusalem, his future travel plans, and final greetings.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on Collection for the Saints (16:1-4), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Corinthians.
This section focuses on Paul's Personal Plans (16:5-12), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Corinthians.
This section focuses on Final Admonitions and Greetings (16:13-24), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 1 Corinthians.

1.commentary:
### Tyndale Study Notes
1 Corinthians 16:1: Paul provides strategic instructions for the Corinthian church, focusing on order, holiness, and the centrality of Christ in communal life.
1.full_commentary:
### Matthew Henry Commentary
We see here the great necessity of humility in the Christian walk. Paul’s earnest desire is for the spiritual prosperity of the believers, reminding them that all blessings flow from the grace of our Lord.

### Jamieson-Fausset-Brown
Analysis of the Greek text reveals Paul's rhetorical strategy. The term 'wisdom' (sophia) here refers to the speculative philosophy highly prized in Corinthian culture, which Paul subverts with the kerygma of the Cross.

key_themes.title: Unity in Christ
key_themes.description: Overcoming divisions and factions within the church.

key_themes.title: Christian Love
key_themes.description: The necessity and characteristics of agape love.

key_themes.title: The Resurrection
key_themes.description: The historical and theological reality of Christ's resurrection and our own.

devotional.question: How does this passage speak to your local church community today?

cultural_historical.title: Corinthian Culture
cultural_historical.text: Corinth was a major Greek port city known for its wealth, diversity, and moral challenges, all of which influenced the church's struggles.
